reasoning: The control 1.1.2 focuses on preventing unauthorized ingress from the internet, which is directly applicable to Kubernetes through NetworkPolicies to enforce default deny ingress rules. Additionally, securing ingress traffic with TLS and restricting the use of LoadBalancer services to prevent exposing services unnecessarily aligns with the control's intent. Enabling a WAF on ingress controllers further enhances security against internet-based threats.
title: Requirement 1.1.2
